title: SPD — Speedy GWAVE variant (Robotron)
tldr: Faster-than-HBDV GWAVE preset — same wavetable engine but configured for snappier per-echo timing. Used for spin/speed-related effects.
how: GWAVE preset with smaller `GPER` (shorter wavetable walk period) so the playback rate is faster. Other parameters tuned to feel "speedier" — possibly a higher-pitched wavetable or a faster-decaying FOFSET modulation.
watch: GWAVE engine view — faster wavetable-cursor walk than HBDV.
